name: Rosemary Fig Confit
recipeIngredient: 1 cup dried Calimyrna figs, chopped fine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-1/2-quart heavy saucepan, stir together the ingredients and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
2. Remove the lid and continue to simmer the mixture, stirring occasionally, until most of the liquid has evaporated and the mixture is thickened.
3. Coarsely puree the fig mixture in a food processor.
(Confit may be made up to 5 days ahead and chilled, covered.)
4. Bring the confit to room temperature before using.
